visual_description: A man in dark clothing stands beside a car at night, his hand resting on the open door. He then walks away from the vehicle, moving toward the camera’s right side along a dimly lit, wet pavement. The scene is dark with ambient streetlights reflecting off the wet ground and car surfaces.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable gasp at the beginning.
